headline: Salesforce AI Adoption In U.K. Regulated Sectors Meets Depressed Valuation
summary: Enterprises in the U.K. are ramping up use of autonomous workflows and generative AI on Salesforce platforms. Regulated sectors such as financial services and government are prioritizing trust, auditability, and policy guardrails in their Salesforce AI deployments. The shift reflects a move from AI pilot projects to larger scale operational use on Salesforce in a tightly regulated market. Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) sits at the center of this shift as U.K. enterprises treat its platform as core...

headline: Asymbl Expands MuleSoft Investment to Orchestrate Digital Workforce, Projecting $13 Million Productivity Impact In 2026
summary: Asymbl, the workforce orchestration company, is announcing a multi-year MuleSoft agreement, expanding its strategic partnership with Salesforce. The agreement establishes MuleSoft Agent Fabric as the orchestration, governance, and observability foundation for Asymbl's hybrid workforce, which is driving a 56x ROI for the business in 2026. This gives Asymbl unified Model Context Protocol (MCP) governance, agent-to-agent orchestration, while Flex Gateway provides redundancy across inference provide

headline: Tesla's Optimus will be 'its biggest product ever'
summary: Laffer Tengler Investments CEO and CIO Nancy Tengler sits down with Brooke DiPalma to expand upon her outlook on Tesla (TSLA), especially as the EV company expands its vision further into autonomous driving and robotics.

headline: U.K. Enterprises Expand Governed Salesforce AI Adoption
summary: LONDON, April 29, 2026--U.K. firms are expanding transformations of Salesforce environments as they adopt autonomous workflows and modernize customer operations, ISG says.

headline: Jeff Bezos, Tim Cook, Jensen Huang Are 'Deadly Competitors,' Says King Charles
summary: King Charles met top U.S. tech CEOs including Jeff Bezos, Tim Cook and Jensen Huang to address Britain's startup funding challenges.
